finding_results.notes: The lockdown now produces an immediate public collision on page. Priya breaks from track clearance to demand same-day confirmation, Yusuf instinctively turns toward a new connection, and Petra physically stops that choice and redirects Priya to observation so the archive pull can happen.

Kai's post-crash voice tag now tracks his pressure tell by lowering the voice instead of using the displaced 'flat' descriptor, while keeping the absent-joke beat.
